# Origin - Impact of AI on society

Provenance and usage record for the companion PDF in this directory.

- **Local file** - `FINAL-Impact-of-AI-on-society.pdf`
- **Title** - Impact of AI on society (as printed on the document)
- **Source / host** - The European Wergeland Centre (wergelandcentre.org)
- **Source URL** - https://wergelandcentre.org/content/uploads/2023/01/FINAL-Impact-of-AI-on-society.pdf
- **Upload path** - `/content/uploads/2023/01/` indicates posted January 2023
- **Authorship** - not independently verified beyond the hosting organization
- **Fixture role** - second-article base for the E11 structure-distance fixture (cross-fixture replication and H44-vs-H55 stress test)

## Purpose

Retained solely for calibration and test-fixture construction in the `docdistance` project - statement segmentation, embedding, and structure-distance test material. Not redistributed, not used for model training, and not part of any published artifact. All rights remain with the original publisher; this local copy supports reproducible experiments only.
